name: review-learnings-0-21-4-rollout
title: Refresh review learnings after 0.21.4 rollout
description: Scan the completed 0.21.4 source and fleet review cycle, refresh the managed repository review-learning block, and ensure durable preventive actions are implemented or tracked without duplicating existing tasks.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Two-day scan inspected 25 PRs and 54 Copilot comments. All signals are historical after resolving three verified stale threads from merged PR #154. Existing prevention was confirmed; the distinct generated remote-path validation defect is tracked by 07-19-review-learning-remote-path-rendering.
